do_nothing.description: Current trends continue. Urban expansion, minimal green investment.

moderate_intervention.description: 10% more canopy city-wide, cool pavement pilots in top-10 TII zones.

ambitious_green.description: +25% canopy, cool roofs on 40% of buildings, urban forest corridors.

justice_first.description: Same total resources — but targeted to top-20 TII zones only.
